description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named generate bundles that triggers on push events. The workflow should have two jobs: build-win and publish_packages. The build-win job runs on a windows-latest environment with a matrix strategy for x64 architecture and AI readiness. It checks out the repository, sets up VC++ 2022, Python 3.11.2, and installs required packages. The job then compiles InVesalius Cython parts, inserts version and commit hash into dialog.py, and generates InVesalius .exe files for both AI-ready and normal builds. The publish_packages job depends on build-win, downloads artifacts, and updates the nightly release.
